programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep110: Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico + Sharks Electrosensory Systems
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico and analyzes shark's electrosensory systems.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep504: Paddling the Swedish-Norwegian Borderlands
programme.desc: Host Heather Herbeck explores the Swedish-Norwegian Borderlands region near Värmland, Sweden on her stand-up paddleboard and competes in a 55K kayak race.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep112: Aquabike World Championship Series
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Olbia, Sardinia, for the Grand Prix of Italy, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep105: Yap
programme.desc: This remote Pacific island is a diver’s paradise and we take advantage of this by diving with giant Manta Rays the size of a small plane. The craziest dive though is when Bill feeds dozens of sharks with no protective gear. We also film where no one has filmed before…The Forbidden Island.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep111: Sand Tiger Sharks as Protectors
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV demonstrates how Sand Tiger Sharks act as protectors and takes a Deeper Dive by explaining male vs female shark differences, shark reproduction, Gray Reef Sharks and shark buoyancy.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 01
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 02
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 03
programme.desc: Some of the greatest pro snowboarders to ever do it, claim Josh Dirksen as their favorite rider to watch. His Microdose story continues, taking on new dimensions with perspectives from more of his MtBachelor Bend Oregon crew: Kevin Jones, Todd Richards, Trevor Graves, Embry Rucker and Robbie Morrow

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 04
programme.desc:
Growing up snowboarding the natural wind features of Mt. Bachelor played a big part in shaping Josh Dirksen's unique and seemingly effortless riding style. He seamlessly transferred his surf and skateboard influenced smoothness to a new audience, when he started filming with Kingpin Productions.
Featuring: Gerry Lopez, Travis Yamada, Kevin Jones, Trevor Graves, Rob Morrow, Allister Schultz, Chad Otterstrom, "Whitey" Rob McConnaughey

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Down For This
programme.desc: Down For This is a rollercoaster of adrenaline and heartfelt emotion in a 1-hour-25-minute slide of 30 years past to present. Featuring some of the most memorable Volcom skating surfing and snowboarding.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 1
programme.desc: In Chapter One of Side Hits Euphoria, snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo showcase their favorite features to ride; random jumps and hits on the side of the piste. They spent their season capturing these little treasures hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 2
programme.desc: Chapter 2 of Side Hits Euphoria features resort riding, side hits, and random stuff on the slopes. In December 2018, the snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo filmed everything they found during their travels to Mount Seymour in Canada, and in Laax and Arêches-Beaufort in Switzerland.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 3
programme.desc: Side Hits Euphoria is back! Chapter 3 features resort riding, side bonking, groomer gliding, and pure shredding. Filmed by the snowboarders Olivier Gittler and Arthur Longo in December of 2019, in and around Tignes, Val d’Isère, Avoriaz and Chamonix, France. Thanks for watching!

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Outta Bounds
programme.desc: Thrasher Magazine and Pusher Bearings present ‘Outta Bounds,’ featuring ledges, hip-hop and skate plazas. Pusher’s international team of technicians knows the recipe. Kilian Zehnder, Nick Dias, Carlos Iqui and more bring the flow from South America to Spain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Slippery Sardona
programme.desc: Once again, the Doodah skateboarding team goes on a special mission. This time, we turn to the valleys of Sardona, where the mountains are upside down. Skateboarders Timmey Krauer, Christoph Rediger, and Oliver Weismantel. Filmer Christian Taro. Must be watched to be believed.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Cool Green Water
programme.desc: Do you like secret skateboarding spots, remote villages, and massive dams? So do we. The valley of Verzasca is a beautiful biosphere hidden in the Swiss Alps. Featuring skateboarders Christoph Rediger, Timmey Krauer and Samuel Aebi, photographer Filip Zuan and filmer Christian Taro. Mountain magic.

programme.title: FEI Awards 2021
programme.desc: More than 300 guests including equestrian legends, National Federations, FEI partners and stakeholders have attended the 13th FEI Awards. Equestrian commentator Steven Wilde has acted as the Master of Ceremonies of this international congregation of the equestrian community. The 2020 Award winners have also been present this year in Antwerp - Ingrid Klimke, Semmieke Rothenberger, Carmen Thiemman, Angelika Trabert, the Ebony Horse Club and more. However, in comparison with last year, this time stars of equestrian sports have been able to celebrate in person, bringing together the equine world to celebrate these achievements. This edition of the FEI Awards is more special as it is the FEI's centennial year and the nominees are of the greatest calibre. Find out how the FEI Awards 2021 went on HorseTV.

programme.title: Oxfordshire Cup - Ferne Park vs Black Bears
programme.desc: As we reach the final countdown for the 18-goal Oxfordshire Cup, Ferne Park and Black Bears are set to play the final for the Oxfordshire Cup. Black Bears remains yet undefeated within the Oxfordshire Cup. Will Ferne Park be able to change the turns of the competition and raise victorious in the competition?Watch the final between Ferne Park and Black Bears on Horse TV.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Explore the serene beauty of Croatia's coastline in stunning pictures, where peaceful music accompanies aerial views of crystal-clear waters and golden autumn landscapes. Let the calm ambiance and vibrant scenery transport you to this picturesque "Land of a Thousand Islands."

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in stunning nature scenes, accompanied by piano music and calming sounds. Let the beauty of mountains, forests, lakes, and seas relax your mind and promote tranquility.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Embark on a visually stunning journey through Yellowstone National Park, featuring geysers, wildlife, and breathtaking landscapes. Immerse yourself in nature’s beauty and soothing sounds for ultimate relaxation.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi R8 Spyder is the most extreme convertible by the German brand. Also: the Ferrari California T scores with Italian passion and elegant lines. And: AMG's GT C Roadster with its roaring sound is a real bad boy with a touch of luxury.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Of what used to be more than 300 tractor manufacturers, only three remain in Germany today. One of them is Deutz. We show the change in tractor construction from the simple tractor to the all-rounder at this traditional company.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: The Fiat 500X, SUV offshoot of the popular 500, is built in Melfi. The plant is one of the most modern in Europe. The FCA Group has invested almost one billion euros in the expansion. Up to 1600 vehicles roll off the production line here every day.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 2 - Meeting and Sailing at Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: MAR
programme.desc: Surfing has ceased a long time ago to be considered a niche sport. As the mainstream industry discovers its potential for selling clothes, trips and a whole set of ‘lifestyle’ products, there are those who appreciate it for what it is in its purest form – a direct connection to mother nature.We accompany Big Wave surfer Alex Botelho and some of his friends to meet surfers who balance their love for the ocean and nature with a professional career in the sport. Mar is a tale of discovery, triumph and (almost) tragedy, but above all it is a life affirming pledge to positive vibes in and out of the line-up.Get ready to soak up a new conception of the world of surf as Alex Botelho unveils concepts unknown for the mainstream audience, available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Best Feature Documentary – Best Istanbul Film Festival 2021. Official Selections 2021: Ocean Film Festival World Tour, International Ocean Film Festival.

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.desc: Laramy and Seven say goodbye to their final camp and head back home.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S01:E02 - Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Big game or small Laramy knows he possesses the time honoured skills to keep himself fed but now he is looking to hunt the fiercest of all - a real man-eater - the Grizzly.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E10 - Wild Boars, Wild Nights Part 2
programme.desc: Bring out the dogs! Manny learns the most effective way to hunt wild boar.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E01 - Dangerous on Land
programme.desc: This episode offers an exciting look at nature with close-ups of wild cats, snakes, crocodiles, scorpions, etc., focusing on the animals' methods of defense or predation (venom, teeth, claws, size, etc.). In this episode you will learn all about the wild world of dangerous animals

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Here's a look at the first year for a new Royal Family after Prince William and Kate welcome a baby boy.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E01 - Koala
programme.desc: This series is a unique look at the early life and development of young animals, edited and narrated from the viewpoint of the animal's themselves. As children explore the wonders of animal life, their natural fascination will deepen into a true love and appreciation of animals. In the first episode we meet Koala.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E02 - Gazelle
programme.desc: We gazelles live on the Savannah in Africa. Mummy said, that the Savannah is a very dry place. My dad has big horns so he can fight to protect us because lions want to eat us. We must be careful even by the river because crocodiles are watching. We eat mainly dry grass and if its not too dry we don’t need to drink much.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E03 - Sea Lion
programme.desc: We live in the ocean! It’s huge and wet. But mainly we live on the ocean shore. That’s where all the seal families make their home. What we love the most is swimming! Water is the greatest fun in the world. We have no problem staying in the water for hours at a time. Together with dolphins, we love to jump into the waves. Look at us go! Isn’t that awesome?

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E04 - Brumby
programme.desc: I am a wild horse who lives in Australia. We were born to run and the difference between me and a farm horse is that I can run freely where I want. I meet with my friends the donkeys and lizards at waterholes which are very precious for us. But watch out! We don’t like to be pushed around or feel threatened.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E05 - Butterfly
programme.desc: We Monarch Butterflies have to chew our way from our egg to see the world. Bite by bite together, with my brothers and sisters we start to feed on the leaves. We don’t have any parents but just know what to do. When we feel cold, hungry, or afraid, we feel the same way as you do. We travel a lot and are capable of eating much more than our own weight. Our life is definitely hard work.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E06 - Pelican
programme.desc: There are many pelicans in the world. We are Australian pelicans. But we don’t live only in Australia. We also live in other parts of the world. Pelicans like to hunt together. We hunt as a team. We swim in the water in a flock making noise with our feet and wings, that's how we drive the fish into shallows where we easily catch them. Flying is very easy for us and our nests are built from grass stems.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E07 - Elephant
programme.desc: Our home is Africa and we also have relatives in India. But this is Africa. We have many friends that live here with us. See? Gazelles, antelopes, wildebeests....all of them only eat what grows out of the ground. Elephants love to play in the water and mud. We throw the mud around, and spray the water all over our bodies. But watch out! We don’t want to meet the lions.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E08 - Tern
programme.desc: We live by the water and build our nests in the sand on the shores. We like to live all together in a flock. We terns are able to fly soooooooo long above the ocean without landing. If we don’t need to, we might not land at all. Flying is a blast! There are lots of different subspecies of tern. And we’re going to visit some of them today. We are all related. It’s kind of like being in a big family.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Pastora boasts to Elisenda about having sent Cirilo to prison and humiliating Clara at the police station.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In the midst of the wine, a mysterious waiter takes a bottle out of his bag and places it next to the glasses with which the godparents will toast.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Back at the restaurant, Patricia breaks down in tears, announcing to her family that there will be no more business because she has no money to do so.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César recalls with deep sadness the moments spent with Adriana in the restaurant kitchen when he is suddenly surprised by the presence of the girl.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max asks Camila to marry him, she does not accept, she recognizes that she loves him, but knowing the truth he would be disappointed and would walk away. Roberto threatens to tell Max what he knows and will talk to Camila to negotiate his silence. Rosa Blanco wants revenge.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max thinks that Camila rejected him for Roberto. In confession with Father Tiziano, he advises her to tell Max the whole truth, but she fears that Roberto will denounce her as a murderer. Julia and Gregorio meet again.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Alberto is shocked to hear that Ignacio's father's name is Guillermo. Lorena controls herself and, with the utmost naturalness, tells him that it is a terrible coincidence of names, nothing more. Magda confesses to Lorena that it was she who denounced Guillermo. Alberto is ready for his wedding, when he receives an unexpected visit from Nilda.

programme.title: TODOS PODEMOS VIAJAR
programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.title: TODOS PODEMOS VIAJAR
programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.title: OLASYVIENTOS
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel defiende a Camila de la acusación de Roberto y confronta a Camila. Max, al encontrarla muy triste, le pide que confíe en él. Julia y Gregorio con un plan para que sus padres piensen que no volverán a verse y dejen de seguirlos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se defiende fieramente de la agresión de Roberto y le cuenta a Max lo sucedido. La Madre Isabel, para ayudar a Camila, le confía a Ezequiel el motivo por el que Roberto la extorsiona. Max presiona a Camila para que le cuente toda la verdad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto confiesa que fue él quien asesinó a Gabriel para inculpar a Camila. Camila, llora de alegría, al saberse inocente de esa muerte. Max le reitera su incondicional apoyo ratificándole su gran amor. Ezequiel expresa su intención de casarse con Camila

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
